zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Buckeley於1471年出生在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾時，她的父親William Bulkeley28歲，母親Ellen Griffith26歲。她於1482年與Hugh Lewes結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1555年在英國英格蘭爾享年84歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Buckeley于1471年出生在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾时，她的父亲William Bulkeley28岁，母亲Ellen Griffith26岁。她于1482年与Hugh Lewes结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1555年在英国英格兰爾享年84岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Buckeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Buckeley was born in 1471, in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, William Bulkeley, was 28 and her mother, Ellen Griffith, was 26. She married Hugh Lewes in 1482. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1555, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Buckeley est née en 1471, à Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bulkeley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ellen Griffith, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Lewes en 1482. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1555, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Buckeley 1471 in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bulkeley 28 und ihre Mutter Ellen Griffith 26. Sie hat 1482 Hugh Lewes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1555 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Buckeley è nata il nel 1471 nel Radnorshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Bulkeley, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Ellen Griffith, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Lewes nel 1482. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1555, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Buckeleyが1471年にイギリスウェールズラドノーシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Bulkeleyは28歳，母Ellen Griffithは26歳であった。1482年にHugh Lewesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1555年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで84歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Buckeley(이)가 1471년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bulkeley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Griffith(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1482년 Hugh Lewes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1555년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Hugh Lewes em 1482. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1555, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Buckeley родилась в 1471 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Bulkeley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Griffith, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Lewes в 1482 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1555 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

Se casó con Hugh Lewes en 1482. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1555, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Gales, Reino Unido.
